n.description: Number of DCs that must be opened

T_limit.description: Maximum allowed travel time from a DC to any hospital it serves

T.description: Travel time from candidate DC location i to hospital j

code.python: assert all(T[i][j] >= 0 for i in range(nS) for j in range(nH))

assumptions.description: The travel time limit is non-negative.
The number of DCs to open does not exceed the number of candidate locations.

x.description: 1 if candidate DC location i is opened, 0 otherwise

y.description: 1 if hospital j is assigned to DC i, 0 otherwise

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[i] for i in range(nS)) == n)

constraints.description: Hospitals can only be allocated to active DCs, using the loose big-M bound of |H|.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[i, j] for j in range(nH)) <= x[i] * nH for i in range(nS))

constraints.description: Each hospital must be assigned to exactly one DC.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[i, j] for i in range(nS)) == 1 for j in range(nH))

constraints.description: Travel time limit: a hospital may only be assigned to a DC within the time limit.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(T[i][j] * y[i, j] <= T_limit for i in range(nS) for j in range(nH))

objective.description: Minimize total drive time across all hospital-DC assignments.

code.gurobipy:
model.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(T[i][j] * y[i, j] for i in range(nS) for j in range(nH)),
    GRB.MINIMIZE
)
